title: Simple Graves
description: Simple Graves is a vanilla Java datapack that protects dropped items after death and guides players back to an owner-locked grave.
body:
# Simple Graves

When a player dies, nearby fresh item drops are captured, frozen above a grave marker, protected from pickup/despawn, and linked to that player. The owner reclaims items by breaking the grave block. If another player breaks it, the block restores and they get an ownership message.

![1](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Hiba550/misc/refs/heads/main/grave/project%20(2).gif)

- Owner-locked graves for multiplayer
- Break grave block to reclaim items
- Grave block restores after explosions instead of auto-claiming
- `/trigger grc_latest` shows latest grave coordinates
- `/trigger grc_list` lists active graves
- Admin bypass functions for trusted recovery helpers

## Notes

This datapack protects real dropped item entities after death. Common deaths such as fall, mobs, drowning, and normal combat are reliable when drops survive long enough to be captured.

Lava, explosions, and void deaths are best-effort because Minecraft can destroy item entities before a datapack can protect them.

XP cannot be protected

## Commands

- `/trigger grc_help`
- `/trigger grc_latest`
- `/trigger grc_list`
- `/function grc:admin/help`
